articles.headline: France head coach Didier Deschamps says 'there's no revenge in football' ahead of Senegal rematch at FIFA World Cup
articles.description: France head coach Didier Deschamps insists that revenge for their 2002 loss to Senegal is not in his side's sights as they approach Tuesday's rematch at the FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Didier Deschamps [1296x729]
images.caption: Didier Deschamps directs traffic at France's training session ahead of their opening FIFA World Cup clash against Senegal.
images.credit: FRANCK FIFE / AFP via Getty Images

images.name: Onuoha praises Diomande's impact in Ivory Coast's win over Ecuador
images.caption: Onuoha praises Diomande's impact in Ivory Coast's win over Ecuador

articles.headline: World Cup Daily Live: Cape Verde hanging tough vs. heavily favored Spain
articles.description: Enjoy all the action from Monday's World Cup matches, with features, news, video analysis and color from around the competition.

images.name: Spain v Cape Verde Pedri Kevin Pina [1296x729]
Moreno: Signing Cucurella would make sense for Real Madrid
images.caption: Moreno: Signing Cucurella would make sense for Real Madrid

articles.headline: Where must the Netherlands improve after Japan draw?

images.name: Where must the Netherlands improve after Japan draw?

articles.headline: Senegal's Nicolas Jackson must use the FIFA World Cup to impress Chelsea, and Xabi Alonso
articles.description: Senegal striker Nicolas Jackson may actually fit new Chelsea manager Xabi Alonso's vision for strikers better than many may initially assume. The FIFA World Cup is a chance to prove that.

images.name: Nicolas Jackson [1296x729]
images.caption: Nicolas Jackson was neither here nor there with Bayern Munich while on loan, and can use the World Cup with Senegal to really up his stocks with new Chelsea manager Xabi Alonso.
images.credit: Cory Knowlton/ISI Photos/ISI Photos via Getty Images

images.name: Chelsea's Nicolas Jackson [1296x729]
images.caption: Nicolas Jackson's time with Chelsea has been largely disappointing for all concerned, but he is an Alonso striker more than most would think.

images.name: Marcotti: Chelsea missing out on Europe is a blessing for Alonso
images.caption: Gab Marcotti explains why Chelsea missing out on a European spot could benefit Xabi Alonso.

articles.headline: Every team's championship, group odds for the 2026 World Cup
articles.description: Odds for all 48 teams to advance from their group through the knockout stage and to win the 2026 World Cup.

images.name: Felix Nmecha [576x324]
images.caption: Felix Nmecha and Germany open strong against Curacao.
images.alt: Felix Nmecha #23 of Germany celebrates his goal by pretending to take off his crown during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E match.

images.name: Vinicius Jr. [1296x729]
images.caption: With a 1-1 draw, Brazil saw their odds to win the World Cup lengthen from +950 to 11-1.
images.alt: Vinicius Junior of Brazil runs with the ball during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match between Brazil and Morocco at New York New Jersey Stadium on June 13, 2026 in East Rutherford, New Jersey.
images.credit: Shaun Botterill - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Yamale for WC Odds file (260529) [1296x729]
images.caption: Spain's World Cup fortunes are tied to the health of Lamine Yamal's left leg.
images.alt: Spain's Lamine Yamal, right, scores his side third goal during the UEFA Nations League quarterfinal second leg match between the Netherlands and Spain at Mestalla stadium in Valencia, Spain, Sunday, March 23, 2025.

images.name: Kylian Mbappe [1296x729]
images.caption: Kylian Mbappe and France are looking to win their third World Cup.

article.headline: United States beats Paraguay in opener on Balogun double
article.description: The United States cruised past Paraguay to open its home World Cup campaign with a statement victory in front of a galaxy of Los Angeles stars.
article.linkText: U.S. beats Paraguay in opener on Balogun double

article.story:
The United States cruised past Paraguay to open its home World Cup campaign with a statement victory in front of a galaxy of Los Angeles stars.

Monaco forward Folarin Balogun scored two well-taken first-half goals as Mauricio Pochettino's side served early notice of their capabilities in a convincing 4-1 win.

The hosts were straight out of the blocks and took an early lead when Paraguay's Damián Bobadilla prodded a Weston McKennie cross into his own net.

The U.S. was irrepressible, and minutes after Balogun had a goal ruled offside, he made no mistake to finish off a flowing move after Christian Pulisic squared it from the left.

They added a third in first-half injury time as Malik Tillman -- among tough competition probably the best player on the pitch -- released Balogun into the box.

The 24-year-old still had a lot to do but worked his way past two Paraguayan defenders, shifted the ball onto his left foot and picked out the top corner, giving Orlando Gill no chance.

Balogun was born in the New York borough of Brooklyn to Nigerian parents. A month later, he moved to England, where he grew up in London. He joined Arsenal's academy at age 8. He represented England at the youth level and also played for the U.S. Under-18 team.

On Friday, he cemented his place as the No. 1 striker for the U.S., a position the Americans have long been looking to fill.

Paraguay's Brazil-born midfielder Mauricio pulled one back in the 73rd minute after finding space on the left of the box.

But the U.S. restored the three-goal cushion deep into injury time as substitute Giovanni Reyna curled in a sublime shot with the outside of his right foot.

Information from PA and The Associated Press was used in this recap.

stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: wonContest
stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: appearances
stats.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

stats.name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
stats.description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

stats.name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
stats.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

stats.name: avgRatingFromEditor
stats.description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

stats.name: avgRatingFromUser
stats.description: The average user rating for a player.

stats.name: dnp
stats.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

stats.name: draws
stats.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

stats.name: foulsCommitted
stats.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

stats.name: foulsSuffered
stats.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

stats.name: goalDifference
stats.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

stats.name: handBalls
stats.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

stats.name: losses
stats.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

stats.name: lostCorners
stats.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

stats.name: minutes
stats.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

stats.name: ownGoals
stats.description: The number of own goals conceded.

stats.name: passPct
stats.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

stats.name: redCards
stats.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

stats.name: starts
stats.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

stats.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

stats.description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

stats.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

stats.description: The percentage of matches won.

stats.description: The number of matches won.

stats.description: The number of corners won.

stats.name: yellowCards
stats.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: aerialsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.name: aerialDuelPct
stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.
